effect.lifedebt.life_debt.description: For the duration, fatal damage triggers a Totem of Undying effect and grants or strengthens Strength. Each death resisted stacks damage reduction and grants knockback resistance equal to that reduction (up to 100%). When the effect ends, max health is reduced by your death count during the buff; this penalty is removed after you respawn.
advancements.lifedebt.burn_out_body.desc: Burned yourself out in endless revival.
lifedebt.message.signed: Life Debt signed — you may cheat death %1$s more times.
lifedebt.message.signed_contract: %1$s signed — you may cheat death %2$s more times.
lifedebt.screen.contract.title: Sign a Life Debt Contract
lifedebt.message.repaid: Debt repaid. Remaining borrowed lives: %1$s; debt: %2$s
lifedebt.message.repay_need_xp: You need %1$s experience levels to repay with a Totem.
lifedebt.message.no_debt: You have no borrowed life to repay.
lifedebt.message.repay_hint: Hold a Debt Voucher or Totem of Undying to repay at the altar.
lifedebt.message.starter_contract: A Totem of Undying has been granted for your first contract.
lifedebt.message.sign_reminder: Right-click a Totem of Undying to sign a contract and lift the 5-heart penalty.
lifedebt.message.soul_pay: Soul Pact: paid %1$s experience levels to soften the cost of death.
lifedebt.message.soul_poor: Soul Pact: not enough experience to soften the cost of borrowing.
lifedebt.message.escape: Escape Pact: you blinked away, but the Debt Collectors drew nearer.
